name: mfe-multizones
description: Projeto de estudos Multi-Zones com Next.js

scripts.dev: concurrently "npm run dev --prefix zone-shell" "npm run dev --prefix zone-catalog" "npm run dev --prefix zone-cart"
scripts.build:all: npm run build --prefix zone-catalog && npm run build --prefix zone-cart && npm run build --prefix zone-shell
scripts.install:all: npm install --prefix zone-shell && npm install --prefix zone-catalog && npm install --prefix zone-cart
